author: design-phase-2a-accessibility-md-d5c6
content: Result: Implemented vitreous_a11y crate with full coverage of all 12 acceptance criteria. Delivered: Role enum (29 variants), AccessibilityInfo/AccessibilityState structs, FocusManager with depth-first tab-order traversal, generate_accesskit_tree() mapping to AccessKit 0.24, default_keyboard_action() for 10 roles, WCAG AA contrast checking with correct sRGB linearization, missing label detection for interactive elements. Also implemented vitreous_events types (Key, KeyEvent, Modifiers, NodeId, MouseEvent, etc.) as a11y dependency. 28 tests passing, clippy clean, fmt clean, full workspace compiles.
